description: Generic multi-view list supporting Table, Card, and List display modes with a built-in view switcher, search, client-side and server-side grouping with per-group mini-pager, pagination, virtualization, external filter builder, and optional view persistence via IDataTableViewProvider.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Items to display in the list (client-side mode).

parameters.name: DataProvider
parameters.description: Server-side data provider. When set, data is loaded via this provider.

parameters.name: ShowPagination
parameters.description: When true, shows pagination bar when more than one page. Default: true.

parameters.name: DefaultPageSize
parameters.description: Default page size for pagination. Default: 25.

parameters.name: TitleField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its display title.

parameters.name: SubTitleField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its secondary text.

parameters.name: AvatarUrlField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its avatar/thumbnail URL.

parameters.name: StatusLabelField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its status label text.

parameters.name: StatusColorField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its status badge CSS color.

parameters.name: DateField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its date value.

parameters.name: IdField
parameters.description: Maps an item to its unique identifier.

parameters.name: CardTemplate
parameters.description: Custom card template. When set, overrides default card rendering.

parameters.name: ListItemTemplate
parameters.description: Custom list item template. When set, overrides default list rendering.

parameters.name: TableRowTemplate
parameters.description: Custom table row template. When set, overrides default table row rendering.

parameters.name: GroupableFields
parameters.description: Fields available for grouping in the dropdown picker.

parameters.name: GroupsCollapsedByDefault
parameters.description: Whether groups are collapsed by default.

parameters.name: OnGroupingChanged
parameters.description: Fires when grouping configuration changes.

parameters.name: ScrollMode
parameters.description: Scroll mode: Pagination (default) or Virtualized.

parameters.name: VirtualScrollHeight
parameters.description: Height of the virtual scroll container. Default: "600px".

parameters.name: VirtualItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated item height for table row virtualization.

parameters.name: VirtualCardHeight
parameters.description: Estimated card height for card view virtualization.

parameters.name: VirtualListItemHeight
parameters.description: Estimated list item height for list view virtualization.

parameters.name: ViewMode
parameters.description: Current display mode (Table/Card/List). Two-way bindable.

parameters.name: ViewModeChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user switches the view mode.

parameters.name: OnItemClick
parameters.description: Fires when an item row/card is clicked.

parameters.name: ShowViewSwitcher
parameters.description: When true, shows the view-mode switcher buttons above the list.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: When true, shows the global search input.

parameters.name: EmptyTitle
parameters.description: Title for the empty state when Items is empty.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

parameters.name: ViewProvider
parameters.description: Optional view persistence provider. When set, shows TmViewManager.

parameters.name: ViewFilterDefinitions
parameters.description: Filter definitions for the view manager filter builder.

parameters.name: ShowExternalFilterBuilder
parameters.description: When true, shows FilterBuilder for external filtering.

parameters.name: ExternalFilterDefinitions
parameters.description: Filter definitions for the external filter builder.

parameters.name: DisplayResolver
parameters.description: Universal display resolver for field labels and enum filter values. DisplayResolver(fieldName, null) returns localized field label; DisplayResolver(fieldName, rawValue) returns localized value (e.g. enum). Return null to use defaults. Set once — flows to ViewManager, FilterBuilder, and filter chips.

parameters.name: ViewCanCreateTenantViews
parameters.description: Whether the user can create tenant-wide views.

parameters.name: CurrentUserId
parameters.description: Current user ID for personal view scoping.

parameters.name: CurrentTenantId
parameters.description: Current tenant ID for tenant view scoping.

examples.title: Multi-view list with field mappings
examples.code:
<TmMultiViewList TItem="ProjectDto"
                 Items="@projects"
                 ViewContext="projects"
                 TitleField="p => p.Name"
                 SubTitleField="p => p.Description"
                 StatusLabelField="p => p.Status"
                 StatusColorField="p => p.StatusColor"
                 DateField="p => p.CreatedAt"
                 OnItemClick="HandleProjectClick"
                 ShowViewSwitcher="true"
                 ShowSearch="true"
                 ViewMode="ListViewMode.Card" />

examples.title: Multi-view list with custom templates and server-side data
examples.code: @user.FullName
